stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes what is the total fuel required for a VFR Commercial Air Transport flight with a multi-engined piston aircraft with a maximum take-off mass of 5700 kg or less? Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Start-up and Taxi Fuel: 2 gal
Climb Fuel: 6 gal
Cruise Fuel: 21 gal
Destination Alternate Fuel: 3 gal
Fuel flow for Final Reserve Fuel: 16 gal/h
Extra Fuel: 0 gal
Discretionary Fuel: 0 gal
